title: The Imp.
content:
You may call him an imp,
        Or a gnome or a sprite;
    And whate'er you call him
        You are sure to be right.

    He is here, he is there,
        He will never stay long;
    If you think he is caught,
        You are sure to be wrong.
meaning:
Richard Hunter's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Imp."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
